SEARCH
Package bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.util

Class ValidationUtil

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.util.ValidationUtil
public class ValidationUtil extends Object
Utility class for input validation. Provides validation for email, phone numbers, and other data. Demonstrates: Encapsulation(private constructors, static methods)
Version:
9.0 (Professional Validation System)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    validateCapacity(int capacity)
    Validates capacity value.
    static void
    validateEmail(String email, FlightBookingSystem fbs, Integer excludeCustomerId)
    Validates email format and checks for uniqueness.
    static void
    validateFlightNumber(String flightNumber)
    Validates flight number format.
    static void
    validateName(String name)
    Validates customer name.
    static void
    validatePhone(String phone)
    Validates phone number format (must be exactly 10 digits).
    static void
    validatePrice(double price)
    Validates price value.
    static void
    validateUsername(String username)
    Validates username format.

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • validateEmail

      public static void validateEmail(String email, FlightBookingSystem fbs, Integer excludeCustomerId) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates email format and checks for uniqueness.
      Parameters:
      email - the email to validate
      fbs - the flight booking system (to check uniqueness)
      excludeCustomerId - customer ID to exclude from uniqueness check (for updates)
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if email is invalid or already exists

    • validatePhone

      public static void validatePhone(String phone) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates phone number format (must be exactly 10 digits).
      Parameters:
      phone - the phone number to validate
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if phone is invalid

    • validateName

      public static void validateName(String name) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates customer name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to validate
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if name is invalid

    • validateFlightNumber

      public static void validateFlightNumber(String flightNumber) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates flight number format.
      Parameters:
      flightNumber - the flight number to validate
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if flight number is invalid

    • validateCapacity

      public static void validateCapacity(int capacity) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates capacity value.
      Parameters:
      capacity - the capacity to validate
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if capacity is invalid

    • validatePrice

      public static void validatePrice(double price) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates price value.
      Parameters:
      price - the price to validate
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if price is invalid

    • validateUsername

      public static void validateUsername(String username) throws FlightBookingSystemException
      Validates username format.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to validate
      Throws:
      FlightBookingSystemException - if username is invalid
